transcript.full_text: [Music] hello everyone my name is ann silvatya and if you are struggling with your academic literature this is the right place so without any further delays let's get started hello everyone welcome to my youtube channel the literature talks and today we are going to write an essay on books as companions so here i have given a heading to the uh every paragraph so it's not mandatory for you to write heading of every paragraph you can or can not write them they are not necessary so let's head to the essay introduction man is a social animal he can't live alone he needs company but the company of a man does not satisfy him in the modern age man has grown selfish and he tries to serve his own interest first friendship breaks when there is the question of self-interest thus friendship between man and a man does not last long then a man moves out in search of a sincere friend he wants a friend who may share his joys and sorrows second paragraph books are real friends books are our best companion in our life they demand nothing from us they take us into a different world of imagination they give us plenty of joy we also learn a lot from books good books improve our standard of living they tone up our intellectual taste they make our outlook broad they console us when we are depressed they encourage us when we are defeated they inspire us to work hard with hope and courage they remove our ignorance and add to our knowledge books enrich our experience and sharpen our intellect thus a good book is our true friend next paragraph avoid bad books a man must avoid reading bad books they may make our life miserable we may have to suffer because of bad books they develop in us bad habits they mislead and misguide bad books ruin our intellect they spoil our interest in reading good and serious books we must avoid reading such bad and cheap books because they waste our time and an urge next paragraph healthy habit of reading books we should develop a healthy habit of reading books we must select the books carefully we should read only good books reading good books has many advantages that books spoil our character they develop unhealthy habits in us we should follow children and young men to read only good books they should act upon the lessons they learn from such books a good book is our friend philosopher and guy next paragraph man seeks pleasure everybody wants pleasure in the life man wants wealth and power for the sake of pleasure he wants to have good health so that he may enjoy the life more and more in the modern age man seeks pleasure everywhere all the discoveries and inventions of science are made from human happiness even saints and sannyasis have a life of suffering in this world for divine pleasure in the other world we get pleasure from various things sports games and films are some of them but the reading of books give us the real pleasure of life when we read good book we forget ourselves we do not remember the cure and anxieties of the world we are sent into a land of beauty imagination and happiness so books are the source of the greatest pleasure in the life next paragraph joy to our life we all know that books give joy to our life but they act as guides too they give us advice and teach us some valuable lessons they make our outlook broad they make our outlook broad they are best friends they are source of information and knowledge when we are in sorrow books inspire us console us and encourage us next paragraph respect to well-read man a well-read man is loved by all he is storehouse of information he knows something of everything a well-read man can be very good talker he can entertain us with his good talks he shows his worth at a social function he can talk about many things so we do not feel dullness and boredom in company of such persons this is another advantage of reading books next paragraph kinds of books books are of different kinds some books deal with topics of general nature everybody likes to read those books there are also some books on certain topics such books are returned for a particular set of readers a general reader likes to read books of journal nature they give us knowledge and pleasure conclusion we should be very careful while we select books good books develop many qualities in us a man of wide reading is a man of culture books magazines and journals do not bore us they make our life happy but cheap and bad books spoil our taste only a sincere reader of good books knows what divine pleasure he gets from reading books [Music]

so here i have given a heading to the uh
every paragraph so
it's not mandatory for you to write

necessary so let's head to the essay
introduction
man is a social animal he can't live
alone he needs company but the company
of a man does not satisfy him in the
modern age man has grown selfish and he
tries to serve his own interest
first friendship breaks when there is
the question of self-interest
thus friendship between man and a man
does not last long then a man moves out
in search of a sincere friend he wants a
friend who may share his joys and
sorrows
second paragraph
books are real friends books are our
best companion in our life they demand
nothing from us they take us into a
different world of imagination they give
us plenty of joy we also learn a lot
from books
good books improve our standard of
living they tone up our intellectual
taste they make our outlook broad
they console us when we are depressed
they encourage us when we are defeated
they inspire us to work hard with hope
and courage
they remove our ignorance and add to our
knowledge books enrich our experience
and sharpen our intellect thus a good
book is our true friend
next paragraph avoid bad books
a man must avoid reading bad books they
may make our life miserable
we may have to suffer because of bad
books they develop in us bad habits they
mislead and misguide bad books
ruin our intellect they spoil our
interest in reading good and serious
books we must avoid reading such bad and
cheap books because they waste our time
and an urge next paragraph healthy habit
of reading books we should develop a
healthy habit of reading books
we must select the books carefully we
should read only good books reading good
books has many advantages that books
spoil our character
they develop unhealthy habits in us we
should follow children and young men to
read only good books
they should act upon the lessons they
learn from such books a good book is our
friend philosopher and guy next
paragraph
man seeks pleasure
everybody wants pleasure in the life
man wants wealth and power for the sake
of pleasure
he wants to have good health so that he
may enjoy the life more and more
in the modern age man seeks pleasure
everywhere all the discoveries and
inventions of science are made from
human happiness
even saints and
sannyasis have a life of suffering in
this world
for divine pleasure in the other world
we get pleasure from various things
sports games and films are some of them
but the reading of books give us the
real pleasure of life when we read good
book we forget ourselves we do not
remember the cure and anxieties of the
world we are sent into a land of beauty
imagination and happiness
so books are the source of the greatest
pleasure in the life
next paragraph joy to our life we all
know that books give joy to our life but
they act as guides too
they give us advice and teach us some
valuable lessons they make our outlook
broad they make our outlook broad they
are best friends they are source of
information and knowledge
when we are in sorrow books inspire us
console us and encourage us next
paragraph
respect to well-read man a well-read man
is loved by all he is storehouse of
information
he knows something of everything a
well-read man can be very good talker
he can entertain us with his good talks
he shows his worth at a social function
he can talk about many things so we do
not feel
dullness and boredom in company of such

reading books

everybody likes to read those books
there are also some books on certain
topics such books are returned for a
particular set of readers a general
reader likes to read books of journal
nature they give us knowledge and
pleasure
conclusion we should be very careful
while we select books good books develop
many qualities in us a man of wide
reading is a man of culture books
